skills.name: devo-database
skills.description: Direct MySQL/Adolfo access to Devo logtrust database. Alert context management, period staggering, domain status, installation table. For Maqui queries use /devo-query.
prompts: Query MySQL database across EU/US/APAC/US3/Santander regions
Check domain status or installation table
Manage alert context or period staggering in DB
